subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: These people study for fifty years to learn the signs of Return, and yet on the Day of the Manifestation, they have remained deprived.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینها پنجاه سال است درس میخوانند که بمعلوم پی ببرند باز در یوم ظهور محروم میمانند
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @differences in human capacity
